em_beta002.note: Identical to ES — JAX rhs_full lacks EM phi_eff, needs same fix as kinetic electrons

em_beta01.note: Identical to ES — same JAX issue

dimits_3_256.note: UNSTABLE at n_kx=256 — ballooning BC phase accumulation at high kx causes blowup

dimits_69_256.note: Killed — instance destroyed after n_kx=256 instability

conclusions.em_effect: EM not propagated to JAX solver drive (same pattern as kinetic_electrons). Need to update JAX rhs_full with phi_eff = phi - v_par * A_par.
conclusions.n_kx_256: Unstable — the ballooning BC at n_kx=256 amplifies high-kx modes. n_kx=128 is the practical limit with current numerics.
conclusions.dimits: n_kx=128 remains the best resolution. The Dimits shift direction (subcritical decay, supercritical growth) is confirmed at n_kx=128.
